evals.prompt: Is Awesome Indie worth submitting to? I'm on a zero budget.
evals.expected_output: Explains it's free, low traffic (~103/mo), backlink type unconfirmed (dofollow vs nofollow sources conflict), recommends submitting as part of broader directory sweep

assertions.name: free_submission
assertions.description: States that Awesome Indie submissions are free with no paid tiers

assertions.name: low_traffic
assertions.description: Mentions the very low traffic (~103 monthly visitors) and sets realistic expectations

assertions.name: backlink_uncertainty
assertions.description: Notes that backlink type (dofollow vs nofollow) is unconfirmed with conflicting sources

evals.prompt: What's the difference between Awesome Indie and SoloPush? Which should I submit to first?
evals.expected_output: Compares the two: SoloPush has instant listing and confirmed dofollow DR46-47, Awesome Indie has editorial queue and unconfirmed backlink. Recommends SoloPush first.

assertions.name: solopush_instant
assertions.description: Notes SoloPush has instant listing with no editorial queue

assertions.name: solopush_backlink
assertions.description: States SoloPush has confirmed dofollow backlinks at DR46-47

assertions.name: submit_order
assertions.description: Recommends submitting to SoloPush first, then Awesome Indie as a set-and-forget queue submission

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to Awesome Indie and what should I include?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission steps: create account, fill form, wait for editorial review. Mentions requirements: dedicated website, indie/bootstrapped product.

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes the submission process: create account, submit form, wait for editorial review

assertions.name: product_requirements
assertions.description: Mentions the product needs a dedicated website and should be made by a solo maker or small team

assertions.name: editorial_queue
assertions.description: Explains there is an editorial review queue with 1-3 products listed per day
